properties.name: auth-lib.client-id
properties.description: OIDC client_id for this app in the configured realm.

properties.name: auth-lib.client-secret
properties.description: OIDC client secret for the confidential client.

properties.name: auth-lib.cache.enabled
properties.description: Whether to cache permission lookups in Redis (if a StringRedisTemplate bean is available).

properties.name: auth-lib.cache.ttl
properties.description: How long to cache permission lookups.
